policy: Only insert LAD networks from verified TIA-exported templates. Do not invent raw FlgNet XML.

templates.description: Minimal LAD XML shape used to teach agents how contacts, negation, coils, multilingual title/comment, and operands appear in exported XML. Use only for parsing and patch dry-run; real imports must start from a TIA V18 export from the target project.
Standard-layout global DB example for HMI/monitoring-friendly motor command/status bits.
templates.compileEvidence: must be produced from local TIA V18 project before production use

templates.description: PLC tag table example for start/stop/fault inputs and motor run output.
